title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Technical Support II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 12th, Diploma, DMLT, and B.Sc can use this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, educational details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, he...
